sc.violations.s: FTC/CPSC issued $91.5M product safety penalty; 3 federal enforcement actions.

health.s: 7 CPSC recalls on record; sample hazard: the cooktop's burners can remain on after use.

topHazards.label: The cooktop's burners can remain on after use, even after being turned to the "off" position, due to misaligned burner knob stems and fractured burner knob com…
The freezer handle can detach when a consumer tries to open the freezer drawer, posing a fall hazard to the consumer.
The ranges can tip over when a heavy object is placed on an open oven door and the anti-tip-over bracket is not secured to the wall or floor, posing a tip-over…

An electrical failure in the dishwasher's heating element can pose a fire hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: GE Appliances, a Haier Company, Recalls Electric Cooktops Due to Burn Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves GE-branded JP3030 knob-controlled electric radiant cooktops manufactured from July 2022 through September 2022 with serial numbers beginning with prefixes LT, MT, RT or ST. The recalled cooktops have black or white glass cooktop surfaces and have four radiant burners with four corresponding "Hot C…
hazards: The cooktop's burners can remain on after use, even after being turned to the "off" position, due to misaligned burner knob stems and fractured burner knob com…
injuries: GE Appliances has received 83 reports of incidents in which a burner failed to regulate temperature accurately and/or power off when the knob was turned to the "off" position. No injuries have been r…
products: Knob-control electric radiant cooktops, model GE JP3030

sampleRecalls.title: GE Appliances, a Haier Company, Recalls Bottom Freezer, French Door Refrigerators Due to Fall Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves six models of GE-brand French Door Refrigerators with bottom freezers in fingerprint resistant stainless steel, which were manufactured from February 2020 through August 2021. The brand name, model, and serial number for each unit are printed on a label located on the top of the left side of the i…
hazards: The freezer handle can detach when a consumer tries to open the freezer drawer, posing a fall hazard to the consumer.
injuries: The firm has received 71 reports of the freezer drawer handle detaching, resulting in 37 reported injuries, including three serious fall injuries.
products: GE-brand Free-Standing French Door Refrigerators in Fingerprint Resistant Stainless Steel
units: About 155,000 (In addition, about 2,300 were sold in Canada)

sampleRecalls.title: GE Appliances, a Haier Company, Recalls to Repair Free-Standing and Slide-In Ranges Due to Tip-Over Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves 30-inch, 24-inch, and 20-inch free-standing and slide-in electric and gas ranges, with seven brand names: GE, GE Profile, Café, Haier, Hotpoint, Crosley and Conservator. The brand name, model number and serial number are printed on a label visible on each unit. Ranges with a serial number that sta…
hazards: The ranges can tip over when a heavy object is placed on an open oven door and the anti-tip-over bracket is not secured to the wall or floor, posing a tip-over…
products: Free-Standing and Slide-In Electric and Gas Ranges

sampleRecalls.title: GE Appliances Recalls Top-Loading Clothes Washers Due to Fire Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: The recall involves three models of GE Profile high-efficiency top-loading clothes washers. The washers come in gold, gray and white and measure about four cubic feet. "GE Profile" is printed on the front of the washers. The model number is located on the rear cover of the washer's backsplash, above the water valve co…
hazards: An electrical component in the washers can overheat, posing a fire hazard.
injuries: GE Appliances has received 71 reports of internal washer components burning or catching fire, including three reports of fires resulting in about $129,000 in property damage. No injuries have been re…
units: About 222,000 (in addition, about 450 were sold in Canada)

sampleRecalls.title: GE Recalls Dishwashers Due to Fire Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves GE, GE Adora, GE Eterna, GE Profile and Hotpoint brand dishwashers. They were sold in black, white, bisque, stainless steel and CleanSteel™ exterior colors and finishes. The model and serial numbers can be found on a metallic plate located on the left tub wall visible when the door is opened. Mode…
hazards: An electrical failure in the dishwasher's heating element can pose a fire hazard.
injuries: GE has received 15 reports of dishwasher heating element failures, including seven reports of fires, three of which caused extensive property damage. No injuries have been reported.
products: GE, GE Adora™, GE Eterna™, GE Profile™ and Hotpoint®, Dishwashers
units: About 1.3 million in the United States

sampleRecords.employer: GE Appliances, a Haier Company, Decatur Plant Operations
sampleRecords.event_description: Compressed or pinched by shifting objects or equipment
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was trying to get wheel parts to feed down into a bucket below a storage rack. The bin needed to be reoriented so the parts door would open; a powered industrial truck was brought over to pull out the container and turn it 45 degrees. When the container moved, a finger on the employee's right hand was caught between the bin and the steel rack. The fingertip was medically amputated.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by swinging part of powered vehicle
sampleRecords.final_narrative: A utility van door closed on an employee's right thumb. The employee was hospitalized.
